segments.text: First listen and then answer the question.
Why will the police have a difficult time?

translations.zh-Hans: 为什么警察将会很难维持秩序？

segments.text: The Greenwood Boys are a group of pop singers.

translations.zh-Hans: “绿林少年”是一个流行歌手组合。

segments.text: At present, they are visiting all parts of the country.

translations.zh-Hans: 目前，他们正在全国各地巡回演出。

segments.text: They will be arriving here tomorrow.

translations.zh-Hans: 他们明天就会到达这里。

segments.text: They will be coming by train and most of the young people in the town will be meeting them at the station.

translations.zh-Hans: 他们将乘火车来，镇上的大多数年轻人会到车站迎接他们。

segments.text: In the evening, they will be singing at the workers' club.

translations.zh-Hans: 晚上，他们将在工人俱乐部演唱。

segments.text: The Greenwood Boys will be staying for five days.
During this time, they will give five performances.

translations.zh-Hans: 在此期间，他们将演出5场。

segments.text: As usual, the police will have a difficult time.

translations.zh-Hans: 和往常一样，警察将会很难维持秩序。

segments.text: They will be trying to keep order. It is always the same on these occasions.

translations.zh-Hans: 他们将设法维持秩序。这种场合总是如此。
